translation.hero_subtitle: We dey scan message, check bad links, and analyze am real time. Zero-trust protection for your communication.
translation.bento_sandbox_desc: Isolate bad links and attachments for safe environment.
translation.features_subtitle: Normal spam filter no fit do this work. Fraudlock learn from Nigerian SMS, sabi our languages, and dey share information with telcos.
translation.feature_0_desc: Random Forest wey learn from 4K+ Nigerian SMS — BVN scam, Ponzi alert, JAMB fraud.
translation.feature_1_desc: E fit catch fraud for 4 Nigerian languages. Scammers dey switch dialect — our AI dey follow.
translation.feature_2_desc: AI go read result aloud with Nigerian accent. Good for people wey no too read well.
translation.feature_3_desc: Report scam number. If 20 people report am, e go send to MTN, Glo, & Airtel.
translation.feature_4_desc: Paste any SMS — you go get confidence %, risk level, and suspicious word within 200ms.
translation.feature_5_desc: Every prediction dey show TF-IDF features, keyword boost, and probability — transparent AI.
translation.how_0_desc: Any language — system go auto-detect Nigerian dialect and Pidgin variants.
translation.how_1_desc: 50K n-gram features wey dem extract, weighted for Nigerian fraud vocabulary.
translation.how_2_desc: 187K-trained ensemble with predict_proba() — no black box.
translation.how_3_desc: Nigerian layer: BVN, JAMB, GTB, OTP, 'double money' patterns.
translation.how_4_desc: Confidence %, risk level, suspicious word — our AI go read am aloud.
translation.lang_subtitle: Change language — every warning and confidence score go change too. Scammers dey switch language; our AI no go miss am.
translation.lang_0_sample: You have won ₦5,000,000! Send your BVN and ATM PIN to claim your prize now.
translation.lang_1_sample: Oga, your account don block! Send your BVN quick quick make we fix am for you.
translation.lang_2_sample: E ku ile o! Owo ₦2,000,000 ti de fun yin. Fi BVN yin ranse lati gba.
translation.lang_3_sample: Nwanne, ego ₦3,000,000 dị n'akpa gị. Zitere anyị BVN gị ugbu a.
translation.lang_4_sample: Ka samu ₦1,000,000! Aika BVN dinka yanzu don karbar kudin.
translation.community_body_1: Every scam number wey you report, we store am, count am, and analyze am. When number reach <1>20 community reports</1>, e go enter our telco list — MTN, Glo, and Airtel go block am.
translation.community_body_2: Your report no go disappear. You fit track am for admin dashboard, see how many people report same number, and know when e don flagged.
translation.cta_subtitle: Join Nigeria AI fraud defense network. Free for citizens. API access for telcos and banks.
translation.footer_tagline: AI SMS Fraud Defense · Made for Nigeria · fraudlock.ng
translation.detect_subtitle: Paste any SMS make we check if na scam. Powered by TF-IDF + Random Forest + SVM.
